text:
I'll search for this paper to verify the cited title and authors.
The web search confirms that the paper exists with the exact title and both cited authors. Multiple sources, including the Journal of Causal Inference (result 3), arXiv (results 1, 4), and academic repositories (results 10), all confirm that 
the paper is titled "Personalized Decision Making -- A Conceptual Introduction" by Scott Mueller and Judea Pearl
. The automated checker's report that found only "Scott Mueller" as the author in its database appears to be an incomplete metadata extraction rather than evidence of fabrication. The actual publication in the Journal of Causal Inference in 2023 clearly lists both authors.

EXPLANATION: The exact paper with this title exists and was published by Scott Mueller and Judea Pearl in the Journal of Causal Inference in 2023, confirming both cited authors. The automated checker's author count mismatch reflects incomplete metadata rather than a hallucinated reference.

LINK: https://www.degruyterbrill.com/document/doi/10.1515/jci-2022-0050/html

FOUND_TITLE: Personalized decision making – A conceptual introduction

FOUND_AUTHORS: Scott Mueller, Judea Pearl

FOUND_YEAR: 2023

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
